title: Principia Omnium Universale: Leonardo's Universal Architecture of Motion, Medium and Form
description: Doctoral-scale thesis reconstructing the universal mechanical and philosophical architecture of Leonardo da Vinci across the Madrid Codices and Codex Atlanticus. Unifies engineering precision with natural philosophy under the governing formula Grammatica Naturae, Lex Motus, et Ars Vivens.

creators.name: Vallance, Richard Steven
creators.affiliation: The People Focused Group, Doncaster, UK

notes: Pre-publication draft. DOI pending explicit release instruction from Richard Steven Vallance.
